events.title: UFC Fight Night: Song vs. Figueiredo
events.primaryDetail: Paramount+ streaming app — stream at paramountplus.com or the Paramount+ app
events.time: Prelims 4:00 AM ET / Main Card 7:00 AM ET

alternatives.detail: Select bouts simulcast live on CBS

events.note: Fight takes place at Galaxy Arena in Macau, China. Early morning US start times due to time zone.

events.title: UFC Freedom 250: Topuria vs. Gaethje
events.primaryDetail: CBS — broadcast live on CBS (free with antenna or cable). Also streaming on Paramount+

events.title: NBA Playoffs 2026
events.primaryDetail: NBC broadcast channel — free with antenna, cable, or live TV apps
events.time: Varies by game — check NBC or Peacock for schedule

alternatives.detail: Stream all NBA Playoff games on Peacock

events.note: NBA moved from ESPN/TNT to NBC, Peacock, and Amazon Prime Video starting with the 2025-26 season.

events.title: NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs 2026
events.primaryDetail: ESPN — check ESPN app or espn.com for game schedule
events.note: NHL Playoffs air across ESPN, ABC, TNT, and Max. Check ESPN+ for streaming access.

events.title: Formula 1 Monaco Grand Prix 2026
events.primaryDetail: ESPN — live race coverage on ESPN and ESPN2

alternatives.detail: Race may simulcast on ABC — check local listings

events.note: Practice and qualifying also on ESPN2. F1 is exclusively on ESPN/ABC in the US.
